author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 07a3dd1e (src/modes/mod.rs). Option (b) from the mandate: clarified the decision boundary in both the enum-variant rustdoc and BehaviorMode::description() output. Extend = Adjacent scope (touch call-site +/- 1 hop), Refactor = Unrestricted scope (cross-module reshape OK). Each description() string now includes a concrete example (Extend: add a field, wire a new tool; Refactor: extract trait, split module). Variant docs explicitly cross-reference each other so picking between them is unambiguous.
